{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328","id":2614382181,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6b1E5l","number":56328,"title":"`@main` entrypoint throw unexpected MethodError if the `main(ARGS)` function return something","user":{"login":"Kolaru","id":17861033,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE3ODYxMDMz","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/17861033?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru","html_url":"https://github.com/Kolaru","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-10-25T15:09:13Z","updated_at":"2024-10-25T15:09:13Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"In 1.11.1, if the `main(ARGS)` function return something that is not an integer or `nothing`, it will error.

For example:

```julia
function main(ARGS)
    return [1]
end

@main
```

```
> julia main.jl 
ERROR: MethodError: no method matching Int32(::Vector{Int64})
The type `Int32` exists, but no method is defined for this combination of argument types when trying to construct it.

Closest candidates are:
  Int32(::Float64)
   @ Base float.jl:966
  Int32(::Float32)
   @ Base float.jl:990
  Int32(::Float16)
   @ Base float.jl:990
  ...

Stacktrace:
 [1] _start()
   @ Base ./client.jl:544
```

I don't know if it is intended, and as far as I can see, it is not documented explicitly (it is not present in the docstring of `@main`, and [the doc page](https://docs.julialang.org/en/v1/manual/command-line-interface/#The-Main.main-entry-point) only mentions that the behavior is equivalent to `exit(main(ARGS))`, which is the root of the problem).","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/56328/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}

{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678","id":1584855848,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM5edvso","number":48678,"title":"Very big BigFloat behaves differently depending on OS","user":{"login":"Kolaru","id":17861033,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE3ODYxMDMz","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/17861033?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru","html_url":"https://github.com/Kolaru","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Kolaru/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2023-02-14T21:28:08Z","updated_at":"2023-02-14T21:28:08Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"On Windows:
```julia
julia> big"-5.87565e+1388255822130839282"
-Inf

julia> versioninfo()
Julia Version 1.8.5
Commit 17cfb8e65e (2023-01-08 06:45 UTC)
Platform Info:
  OS: Windows (x86_64-w64-mingw32)
  CPU: 4 × Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-6600K CPU @ 3.50GHz
  WORD_SIZE: 64
  LIBM: libopenlibm
  LLVM: libLLVM-13.0.1 (ORCJIT, skylake)
  Threads: 1 on 4 virtual cores
```

On Ubuntu (WSL):
```julia
julia> big"-5.87565e+1388255822130839282"
-5.875649999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999983e+1388255822130839282

julia> versioninfo()
Julia Version 1.8.5
Commit 17cfb8e65ea (2023-01-08 06:45 UTC)
Platform Info:
  OS: Linux (x86_64-linux-gnu)
  CPU: 4 × Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-6600K CPU @ 3.50GHz
  WORD_SIZE: 64
  LIBM: libopenlibm
  LLVM: libLLVM-13.0.1 (ORCJIT, skylake)
  Threads: 1 on 4 virtual cores
```

It was first noticed on CI on https://github.com/JuliaIntervals/IntervalArithmetic.jl/pull/555.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/48678/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null}}
